name: Mailtrack Email Tracking API
what_it_does: Gmail email tracking and read receipt platform with API — providing real-time notifications when emails are opened, double-tick read receipts similar to WhatsApp, link click tracking, per-recipient tracking in group emails, and sales engagement analytics for Gmail users.
use_cases: Querying email open events and timestamps for sales follow-up timing optimization
Tracking per-link click data in emails for prospect engagement scoring
Integrating email engagement signals with CRM for pipeline health indicators
Monitoring team email tracking metrics for sales manager dashboards
Building follow-up automation triggers based on email open/no-open events
not_for: Full email campaign and sequence management (use Mixmax or Salesloft)
Mass cold email at scale (use Instantly.ai or Lemlist)
best_when: An individual salesperson or small team using Gmail wants simple, reliable email open tracking with real-time notifications and minimal setup complexity.
avoid_when: You need full campaign management, follow-up sequences, CRM-integrated workflows, or email tracking for Outlook.

auth.notes: OAuth2 authorization code flow. Gmail OAuth required for tracking access. Account-scoped. Webhook for email open and click events. API primarily for reading tracking data — no send API. B2B plans with team management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free with Mailtrack signature branding on tracked emails
pricing.notes: Spanish company (Barcelona). Founded 2013. Very low price point — most affordable email tracking. 3M+ users. Simple, focused product — just email tracking. Double-tick read receipt UX familiar from WhatsApp/iMessage. Chrome extension based. API limited compared to full sales engagement platforms.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for tracking events and analytics. OAuth2 auth. Limited API documentation — primarily a consumer product with limited developer focus. Webhook for open/click events. API is read-only for tracking data. Teams API for multi-user management.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All tracking reads are fully idempotent. Event data is read-only — no write operations that could create duplicates.
known_agent_gotchas: API is primarily read-only — no programmatic email sending
Free tier shows Mailtrack branding in tracked emails — affects sender reputation
GDPR: EU-based company, EU data residency — tracking may require recipient consent in EU
Limited API scope vs full sales engagement platforms — only tracking data

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. EU data residency. OAuth2 auth. Email tracking is behavioral PII — GDPR consent consideration for EU recipients. Gmail read permissions via OAuth require minimal scope. Spanish company with EU data protection standards.
